tasks.label: build-frontend
tasks.command: cd frontend && npx react-scripts build 2>&1 | tee build_output2.txt

tasks.label: build-frontend-check
tasks.command: cd frontend && npx react-scripts build 2>&1 > build_output2.txt

tasks.label: build-frontend-v2
tasks.command: cd frontend && npx react-scripts build > build_output2.txt 2>&1

tasks.label: build-frontend-v3
tasks.command: cd frontend && npx react-scripts build > build_output3.txt 2>&1 && echo BUILD_SUCCESS

tasks.label: build-frontend-final
tasks.command: cd frontend && npx react-scripts build > build_output_final.txt 2>&1 && echo BUILD_SUCCESS || echo BUILD_FAILED

tasks.label: run-all-backend-tests-v2
tasks.command: cd backend && npm test -- --forceExit > ../test_output.txt 2>&1 && echo TEST_PASS || echo TEST_FAIL

tasks.label: run-all-backend-tests-v3
tasks.command: cd backend && npm test -- --forceExit > ../test_output2.txt 2>&1 && echo TEST_PASS || echo TEST_FAIL

tasks.label: run-all-backend-tests-v4
tasks.command: cd backend && npm test -- --forceExit > ../test_output3.txt 2>&1 && echo TEST_PASS || echo TEST_FAIL

tasks.label: run-playwright-e2e
tasks.command: cd frontend && npx playwright test > ../e2e_output.txt 2>&1 && echo E2E_PASS || echo E2E_FAIL
